citation: Badgeley MA, Zech JR, Oakden-Rayner L, et al. Deep learning predicts hip fracture using confounding patient and healthcare variables. NPJ Digit Med. 2019;2:31.
case_summary: Model exploited process and context variables beyond intended pathology signal.
